who: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
offer: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We provide an onboarding assistant instead of manual onboarding processes using email and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes lead to delays in new hire productivity.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR coordinators seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about onboarding workflows
Send DMs to HR coordinators with demo video links
Participate in community forums for HR tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try Task checklist for new hires and Manual invoice entry form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for the first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing hire data
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
